result.status_detail: Cycle 94 R-8 perplexity Experiment 5 (5-event structure + thread_url_slug='' + frontend_context_uuid echo + final COMPLETED). Result MIRRORS #583 — empty thread_url_slug forces /search/new/{uuid} fallback URL pattern. UI shows user bubble + persistent '사고' Thinking status (40s+). Different from #586 (which had clean /search/{uuid} but empty page). Final COMPLETED signal NOT being recognized — client stays in Thinking state.
result.experiment: Experiment 5: OLD 5-event structure (Exp2 base) + thread_url_slug='' + frontend_context_uuid echo + status=COMPLETED final event
result.verdict: User bubble RENDERS (good), Thinking persists (bad — same as Exp2/3). 5-event structure preserves UI bubble but final COMPLETED transition not happening. Empty thread_url_slug forces /new/ fallback URL.
result.diff_from_586: POSITIVE: user bubble visible (vs empty page in 586). NEGATIVE: /new/ fallback URL (vs clean /search/{uuid} in 586); persistent Thinking (vs no Thinking but no content in 586).
result.key_observation: There seems to be a TRADE-OFF between (a) clean URL /search/{uuid} via thread_url_slug=backend_uuid → empty page (586); (b) /new/ fallback via thread_url_slug='' → user bubble + Thinking (583/584/587). Neither rendering both user bubble AND warning text. The COMPLETED state signal might require additional fields/events to trigger Thinking→Render transition.
next_experiment_recommendations: Experiment 6: Combine 586's clean URL (thread_url_slug=backend_uuid) WITH 587's 5-event structure — maybe both routing-clean + user-bubble-renders work together
Experiment 7: Inspect actual NETWORK CAPTURE of 587 events (what the worker sent) to verify what client received vs expected. Use F12 EventStream tab with this experiment running.
Experiment 8: Check classifier_results field — observed in 585 mid-stream event with detailed mhe_predictions. Maybe required for client to transition to render mode.
Experiment 9: Look at 'reconnectable: true' field — maybe client is trying to reconnect/wait because flag is set
Experiment 10: Check 'cursor' field — observed in 585 events with values like '069eecc2-5cde-7f14-...'. May be a stream-progression key client uses to track event order.

notes: Cycle 94 R-8 perplexity Exp5: user bubble + Thinking pattern recurs. 5-event structure with empty thread_url_slug doesn't unblock final transition. Suggesting next direction: examine more fields from 585 ground truth (cursor, reconnectable, classifier_results) that may be required for Thinking→Render state machine. Also DevTools-capture an Exp run to compare worker-sent envelope against expected.
